query: CREATE TABLE `tasks` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `clientId` int NOT NULL, `recurringTaskId` int, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `description` text, `taskType` enum('DAS','NFS','DCTF','SPED','OUTROS') NOT NULL, `competencia` varchar(7) NOT NULL, `dueDate` timestamp NOT NULL, `status` enum('PENDENTE','EM_ANDAMENTO','CONCLUIDA','VENCIDA') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDENTE', `notes` text, `completedAt` timestamp, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
